title: DeepClaude – Claude Code agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro
summary: DeepClaude 是一个将 Claude 的代码代理循环与 DeepSeek V4 Pro 模型结合的开源项目，看点在于融合两大模型的推理与编码能力，提升自动化编程效率。

title: Show HN: Apple's SHARP running in the browser via ONNX runtime web
text:
Hi HN, author here. SHARP is Apple's recent single-image 3D Gaussian splatting model (https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.10685). Their reference code is PyTorch + a pretty heavy pipeline; I wanted to see if it could run in a browser with no server hop, so I exported the predictor to ONNX and ran it via onnxruntime-web with the WebGPU EP.

What works: drop in an image, get a .ply you can download or preview live, all on your machine — your image never leaves the tab. The model is large (~2.4 GB sidecar) so first load is slow on a cold cache, but inference itself is a few seconds on a recent Mac.

Caveats: SHARP's released weights are research-use only (Apple's model license, not the code's). I host the exported ONNX on R2 so thedemo "just works", but you can also export your own from the upstream Apple repo and upload locally.

Happy to talk about it in the comments :)
summary: 该帖展示了将苹果最新的单图像3D高斯泼溅模型SHARP移植到浏览器中运行，用户可直接在本地处理图像并下载3D模型，无需服务器交互，但首次加载较慢。

title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
summary: OpenAI 分享了其低延迟语音AI系统在规模化部署中的技术架构与优化策略，看点在于如何平衡实时性与大规模并发。

title: Agent Skills
summary: 该帖子探讨了AI代理（Agent）应具备的核心技能，如任务规划、工具使用和自主决策，看点在于为开发者提供了构建高效自主代理的实用指南。

title: Let's talk about LLMs
summary: 该文深入探讨了大语言模型（LLM）的技术局限性与实际应用中的常见误解，看点在于作者以批判性视角剖析了LLM的“理解”本质，并提醒开发者避免过度依赖其表面智能。

title: Transformers Are Inherently Succinct
summary: 该论文证明Transformer模型在数学上具有内在的简洁性，其注意力机制能自动压缩冗余信息，看点在于为理解大模型的高效性提供了理论依据。

title: Using “underdrawings” for accurate text and numbers
summary: 该帖子介绍了一种名为“底稿”的技术，通过在最终绘制前先绘制辅助草图来确保文本和数字的精确对齐与布局，看点在于其简单有效的手动排版方法。

title: Why are neural networks and cryptographic ciphers so similar? (2025)
summary: 该文探讨了神经网络与密码算法在结构上的深层相似性，指出两者都依赖非线性变换、扩散与混淆机制，并揭示了这种共性对AI安全与密码学设计的启发。
